description_long: This is a detailed model of a classic fire truck, predominantly painted in a vibrant red color with black and silver accents. The vehicle features a boxy cab at the front, with a long rectangular body extending behind, typical of fire engines used in urban environments. Along the sides, there are visible compartments and equipment storage areas, as well as wheels with black tires and silver rims. A long, coiled hose is attached to the truck, and emergency lights are mounted on the roof, providing high visibility. The front of the truck displays a grille and headlights, while the rear and sides show additional firefighting equipment and access panels. The overall design is robust, functional, and clearly intended for emergency response scenarios.
description: A classic red fire truck with emergency lights, hose, and equipment compartments, designed for urban firefighting. The vehicle features a boxy cab, long body, and visible firefighting tools.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cab, grille, headlights, and emergency lights on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the truck, equipment compartments, wheels, and attached hose.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the truck, hose attachment, and rear access panels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional compartments, wheels, and the extended hose.
